templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://www.reynspooner.com/collections/sale

templates.name: Does the Star Wars Sithmas shirt have 2022 printed on it like the Hawaiian shirt?
templates.content: No, it doesn't have the year 2022 printed on it like the Hawaiian Christmas shirt does.

templates.name: Spooner University School Requests
templates.content: You can request for your school to be included through this link: https://reynspooner.attn.tv/sl/LRZ3ViSZ

templates.name: Do you have a UK/EU website?
templates.content: We have an EU/UK website you can purchase from if you're located in those regions. Here's the URL: https://reynspooner.eu/

templates.name: Will your "coming soon" items be discontinued?
templates.content: Any items that say "Coming Soon" on the product page are only temporarily out of stock and should be available again within the next two weeks. Go ahead and sign up to be notified on the product page so you're the first to know when the item comes back in stock.

templates.name: Are your MLB styles sold in stores?
templates.content: Our MLB styles are only available online and not in any of our retail stores at this time!

templates.name: Shipping Rates
templates.content: Ground shipping delivery takes 5-8 business days and it costs $9.95. Two-day shipping costs $17.95 and takes 2 business days - orders must be placed before 10am PST to ship out the same day. Orders for overnight shipping have to be placed before 10am PST to ship out the same day and costs $31.95.

templates.name: Will you offer unlined swim trunks
templates.content: We're planning on launching a board short swim style (unlined) in Spring of 2023. Be sure you're signed up to our newsletter so you're kept up to date on everything!

templates.name: Where are your items made / manufactured?
templates.content:
While a significant portion of our apparel is now sewn in Asia, we still maintain production in Hawaii. Products such as our Lahaina Sailor Collection, kids apparel, eco-products such as Aloha Squares, napkins and reusable bags as well as much of our accessories are still hand sewn in Hawaii. 

We've also started an in-sourcing strategy beginning with our Made in California Indigo Collection 2016. Moving forward, we are committed to actively look for ways to increase our Made in Hawaii and Made in the USA programs.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/reynspooner/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/reynspooner

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.reynspooner.com/pages/return-information

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://www.reynspooner.com/pages/store-locator

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1 888-402-5056 (Mon-Fri 9:30am- 5:30pm and Sat-Sun 9:30am-2:30pm PST) or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at ohanacare@reynspooner.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at ohanacare@reynspooner.com, live chat with one of our agents via the website or give us a call at 1 888-402-5056. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 2-3 business days and we usually ship via USPS, UPS or FedEx. Once shipped it will take 5-8 business days for domestic orders.

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Feel free to use our measuring guide and size chart here: https://www.reynspooner.com/pages/size-fit-guide-2 to help you choose the most accurate size. Also, if you've purchased with us before, all of our men's woven shirts fit the same so you can re-order whatever size worked best for you in the past. If you're a new customer, please note that our men's aloha shirts run slightly larger than other brands and we recommend sizing down if you're in between sizes.  Our Performance Polos run smaller than our classic button-down shirts. For example, if you wear an XL in our classic button-down, you should get a size 2XL (or one size up) in our performance polos. If you haven't purchased a button-down shirt from us before, we recommend taking your true size in our polos!

templates.name: Can I use the welcome coupon/code in stores?
templates.content: Our welcome discounts are applicable to online orders only.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at ohanacare@reynspooner.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Where do you ship from?
templates.content: We ship from our distribution center located in Fontana, CA (Southern California).

templates.name: How soon will I get my refund?
templates.content: We automatically issue a refund for the items you selected in the Returns Portal when your package is received and processed at our warehouse.

templates.name: Do you ship to P.O. Boxes?
templates.content: Yes, we are able to ship to P.O. Boxes. If you place an order with a P.O. Box shipping address, there may be additional transit time for your order.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: Due to the processing requirements of our order and shipping management system, we can't make any changes or additions to your order once it has been placed! Feel free to return the order for a refund once it arrives.

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: You can start your return here: https://reynspooner.returnscenter.com

templates.name: Can I return or exchange my order in store?
templates.content:
For your convenience, items purchased online from Reynspooner.com may also be returned or exchanged at any Reyn Spooner retail store. Please bring your order packing slip and shipping materials with you to process your return.
Please note that to be refunded for your online purchase, the item must be available in one of our retail stores. If the item is no longer available in our stores, you can exchange your item for another item in-store or ship your item back to us for a refund.

templates.name: Can you add more Collegiate Performance Polos, the ones I want aren't available
templates.content: Sure! You can request for Collegiate Performance Polos to be made for your colleges through this link: https://www.reynspooner.com/pages/college-contact-form Our team will look into this and mahalo for your suggestion!

templates.name: Size Chart: All - Clothes
templates.content: You can take a look at our size chart here: https://www.reynspooner.com/pages/size-fit-guide-2

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a rewards/referral program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://www.reynspooner.com/pages/rewards?srsltid=AfmBOoqV2wtIFbwmYK2OAU82wiT4bxm2yKp5v7g4ERux3r-znFsOZHMr

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free USPS ground shipping on domestic orders over $150. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! You can learn more and apply for your discount here: https://www.reynspooner.com/pages/exclusive-discounts

templates.name: Restock button (autosend enabled)
templates.content: I currently don't have the exact date of a possible restock, but I recommend signing up on the product page so you're notified in case it comes back in!
